title: Solo Leveling Arsenal
body:
### This is a 3D Weapon Resourcepack

![Solo Leveling](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/677dae767d5ec26a41805239/67ea7a6533671caab89ba11f_Bild-2025-03-12-194628251-p-800.png)

### **This pack is for [Solo Leveling: Reawakening](https://modrinth.com/mod/solo-craft-reawakening)**

![Solo Leveling](https://i.ibb.co/zWY83HgM/Bild-2025-02-28-213408122.png)

### [Click here for Showcase!](https://blades-of-war-2.webflow.io/solo-leveling-arsenal)

Reworked Weapons so far:
- Kasakas Venom Fang
- Knight Killer
- Baruka's Dagger
- Demonking Daggers
- Demonking Longsword
- Moonlight Refractor
- War Axe
- E-S Rank Swords
- E-S Rank Katanas
- E-S Rank Daggers
- Gravity Dagger
- Mythic Dagger
- Spirit Bow
- Frost Blade
- Kamish Daggers - New!
- Awakened Venom Fang - New!

ToDo List:
- E-S Rank Spear
- Hammer
